CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id = param_value.id;
CREATE TABLE settings_test (setting_name String, setting_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY setting_name;
SELECT setting_value FROM settings_test WHERE setting_name = param_name.setting_name;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (date Date, value Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY date;
INSERT INTO nested_test SELECT today(), rand() FROM system.numbers LIMIT 100;
SELECT SUM(value) FROM nested_test WHERE date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_test WHERE value > param_value_threshold AND date = param_date.date;
